member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Builders.TestClaimsPrincipalBuilder
member.summary: Builder for creating test-safe instances. Used to simulate authenticated users in token and authorization tests.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Builders.TestClaimsPrincipalBuilder.CreateDefault
member.summary: Creates a default with common identity claims. Includes NameIdentifier, Name, and Role ("Admin").

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Data.InvalidData
member.summary: Provides invalid test data for identity-related scenarios.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Data.InvalidData.SessionIds
member.summary: Gets a collection of invalid session ID values.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Data.InvalidData.TenantIds
member.summary: Gets a collection of invalid tenant ID values.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Data.InvalidData.Scopes
member.summary: Gets a collection of invalid scope values.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Data.InvalidData.Roles
member.summary: Gets a collection of invalid role values.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Data.InvalidData.Providers
member.summary: Gets a collection of invalid provider values.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Data.InvalidData.Usernames
member.summary: Gets a collection of invalid username values.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.JwtTokenOptionsFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating test-safe instances. Used to configure token generation logic in unit and integration tests.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.JwtTokenOptionsFactory.CreateDefault
member.summary: Creates a default instance with hardcoded values. Suitable for most token generation tests.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.MockLoggerFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating mock ILogger instances.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.TestAppUserIdentityFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating test-safe instances. Provides default configurations and targeted overrides for identity-related tests.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.TestAppUserIdentityFactory.CreateDefault
member.summary: Creates a default user with safe, realistic values.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.TestAppUserIdentityFactory.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a user with a specified username and derived email.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.TestAppUserIdentityFactory.LockedOut
member.summary: Creates a user marked as locked out with elevated failure count.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.TestAppUserIdentityFactory.CreateWithEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a user with a specified email address.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.TestAppUserIdentityFactory.CreateWithUserName(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a user with a specified username.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.FakeRefreshTokenFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating test-safe instances of . Lives in Fakes for test-only usage, but uses Stub model for realistic shape.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.FakeRefreshTokenFactory.Create(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a valid refresh token with optional user ID and username.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.FakeRefreshTokenFactory.Expired(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Creates an expired refresh token for testing expiration logic.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Factories.FakeRefreshTokenFactory.Revoked(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a revoked refresh token for testing revocation logic.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Scenarios.LoginScenario
member.summary: Fluent builder for composing identity login test scenarios. Wires up user, roles, and tokens for expressive, modular test setup.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Scenarios.LoginScenario.WithDefaultUser
member.summary: Starts a scenario with a default user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Scenarios.LoginScenario.WithUser(System.String)
member.summary: Starts a scenario with a user created by username.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Scenarios.LoginScenario.WithUser(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser)
member.summary: Starts a scenario with a fully constructed user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Scenarios.LoginScenario.WithRoles(System.String[])
member.summary: Adds roles to the scenario.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Scenarios.LoginScenario.WithTokensFrom(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.Jwtoken.IJwtUserTokenManager{System.Guid})
member.summary: Injects a token manager to generate access and refresh tokens.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Scenarios.LoginScenario.Build
member.summary: Finalizes the scenario and generates tokens if a token manager is provided.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Validators.AlwaysFailUserValidator`1
member.summary: A test validator that always fails when validating an IdentityUser. Implements IUserValidator to simulate failure in ASP.NET Identity pipelines.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Fakes.Validators.ReservedUserNameValidator
member.summary: Validates that the username is not part of a reserved list (e.g., 'admin', 'root').
